_comment: Weights/limits for the per-frame animation IK solve (render-only; hot-reloaded on desktop). Empirical — tweak by feel. See Plans/ANIMATION_SOLVER_PLAN.md 11.4. Rough tiers: hard pins >= contacts >= priors, kept a MODEST spread so the solve stays well-conditioned. Pose priors are per-region: stiff torso, loose limbs.
